title: magnolia pumila var. championii
intro: Magnolia pumila var. championii, also known as the Chinese Evergreen Magnolia or Miniature Magnolia, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Magnolia pumila var. championii include teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional.
